name: Integrity Checker
overview: Re-hashes every file in your managed folders and flags any whose contents no longer match what Shoko has stored, leaving mismatches as unrecognized for re-matching — the same outcome as a manual single-file rescan, run in bulk with a small dashboard to drive it.

releases.release_notes:
## What's new

- **Scope your checks**: the dashboard now has a folder picker so you can run an integrity check
  against just the managed folders you choose, instead of always walking your entire library.
  Leave everything selected for the previous full-library behavior, or narrow it down for a
  faster, more targeted run. The picker is backed by a new `GET /folders` endpoint, and the
  dashboard's summary now shows which folders a run was scoped to (including after a restart).
- Tightened up the dashboard copy — the header and results panel were both explaining the
  detach/re-match mechanism; that's now said once, where it's relevant.
